# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

- 200

    - name: Register filesystem snapshot repository
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/fs_shared"
        method: PUT
        user: "{{ es_user }}"
        password: "{{ es_pass }}"
        validate_certs: yes
        body_format: json
        body:
          type: fs
          settings:
            location: "{{ fs_backup_path }}"
            compress: true
            max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "250mb"
            max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "500mb"
        status_code:
          - 200

    - name: Verify S3 repository
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/s3_production/_verify"
        method: POST
        user: "{{ es_user }}"
        password: "{{ es_pass }}"
        validate_certs: yes
        status_code:
          - 200
      register: s3_verify

    - name: Verify filesystem repository
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/fs_shared/_verify"
        method: POST
        user: "{{ es_user }}"
        password: "{{ es_pass }}"
        validate_certs: yes
        status_code:
          - 200
      register: fs_verify

    - name: Create SLM daily policy
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_slm/policy/daily-snapshots"
        method: PUT
        user: "{{ es_user }}"
        password: "{{ es_pass }}"
        validate_certs: yes
        body_format: json
        body:
          schedule: "0 30 2 * * ?"
          name: "<daily-snap-{now/d{yyyy.MM.dd}}>"
          repository: "s3_production"
          config:
            indices:
              - "*"
              - "-.monitoring-*"
              - "-.watcher-history-*"
            ignore_unavailable: true
            include_global_state: true
          retention:
            expire_after: "30d"
            min_count: 7
            max_count: 30
        status_code:
          - 200

    - name: Create SLM hourly policy
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_slm/policy/hourly-snapshots"
        method: PUT
        user: "{{ es_user }}"
        password: "{{ es_pass }}"
        validate_certs: yes
        body_format: json
        body:
          schedule: "0 0 * * * ?"
          name: "<hourly-snap-{now/h{yyyy.MM.dd-HH}}>"
          repository: "s3_production"
          config:
            indices:
              - "app-logs-*"
              - "metrics-*"
              - "business-data-*"
            ignore_unavailable: true
            include_global_state: false
          retention:
            expire_after: "72h"
            min_count: 24
            max_count: 72
        status_code:
          - 200

    - name: Display setup summary
      debug:
        msg: |
          Snapshot Configuration Complete:
          - S3 Repository: {{ s3_verify.json | default('verified') }}
          - FS Repository: {{ fs_verify.json | default('verified') }}
          - SLM Policies: daily-snapshots, hourly-snapshots
          - Cluster Health: {{ cluster_health.json.status }}

  handlers:
    - name: restart elasticsearch
      service:
        name: elasticsearch
        state: restarted
